## 🥧 ARM32 Support (Raspberry Pi)
[![piwheels](https://img.shields.io/badge/piwheels-ARM32%20verified-97BF0D?logo=raspberrypi&logoColor=white)](https://www.piwheels.org/project/omnipkg/)
**Latest Version:** `2.5.0` | **Python:** 3.9 (Bullseye), 3.11 (Bookworm) | [View on piwheels](https://www.piwheels.org/project/omnipkg/)
```bash
pip3 install omnipkg==2.5.0
```
**Verified Platforms:**
- 🍓 Raspberry Pi (armv6/armv7) - Bullseye, Bookworm, Trixie
- 📦 Wheel: [`https://www.piwheels.org/simple/omnipkg/omnipkg-2.5.0-cp311-cp311-linux_armv7l.whl`](https://www.piwheels.org/simple/omnipkg/omnipkg-2.5.0-cp311-cp311-linux_armv7l.whl)
